rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0001
rows.name: Lin-san! Lin-san! What are you making-mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0003
rows.name: Okay Tatsu, go take a bath before dinner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0004
rows.name: Okay—! Tatsu gets the first bath-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wow~ There's a pretty reddish-purple
bath salt in here-mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0009
rows.name:
Still, you actually pulled off a nori-tsukkomi.
Didn't expect that from you, Tatsu.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs99110110_MSG0010
rows.name:
You did that on purpose-mo!
Definitely on purpose-mo~~![ST:wait ]
